meta.title: Model Exchange - AI Model Marketplace
meta.description: Discover and integrate cutting-edge AI models. A marketplace for LLM providers to list, price, and distribute their models.

dashboard.title: My Models
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your AI models listed on the marketplace
dashboard.noModelsDesc: Get started by adding your first AI model to the marketplace.
dashboard.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what your model does, its strengths, and ideal use cases...
dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this model?
dashboard.freeTokensHint: Leave empty if no free tier. Enter the number of free tokens per month.
dashboard.billingPlatform: Bill through Model Exchange (15% platform fee)
dashboard.billingPlatformDesc: We handle payments, invoicing, and usage tracking. You receive 85% of all revenue automatically.
dashboard.billingExternalDesc: You manage payments yourself. Your model is listed for free on our marketplace for exposure.

hero.title: Discover, Compare & Integrate
hero.subtitle: The premier marketplace where AI model providers list their LLMs with transparent pricing. Find the perfect model for your use case.

modelDetail.sampleProviderDesc: This model is provided by {provider}. Visit their official website for API access, documentation, and integration guides.
modelDetail.communityProviderDesc: {provider} has listed this model on Model Exchange. Contact them directly for pricing details, API access, and custom integration support.
modelDetail.availableProvidersDesc: Compare pricing and speed across different providers for this model
modelDetail.pricePerMillion: All prices are in USD per million tokens
modelDetail.billingPlatformInfo: This model is billed through Model Exchange. The platform charges a {rate} fee on all transactions.
modelDetail.billingExternalInfo: This provider handles billing externally. Contact them directly for pricing and payment.
modelDetail.quickStartFreeDesc: This model is free to use — no API key required. Just call the endpoint directly:
modelDetail.quickStartNoKey: No authentication needed. Start building immediately.

models.sectionSubtitle: Explore top-rated large language models from leading providers

comingSoon.title: Media Models
comingSoon.subtitle: We're expanding beyond LLMs. Image generation, video synthesis, audio processing, and multimodal models are on the way.
comingSoon.videoSynthDesc: AI-powered video generation and editing models

footer.tagline: The marketplace for AI model providers and consumers.

usage.title: Usage Analytics
usage.subtitle: Track API calls, token usage, and performance across models and providers (last 30 days).
usage.noLogsHint: Usage logs appear here when you make API calls through the gateway or run speed benchmarks.

leaderboard.title: AI Model Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Daily-updated rankings aggregated from leading AI benchmarks, plus real-time speed tests for providers on our platform.
leaderboard.sources: Sources: Scale AI SEAL, Chatbot Arena
leaderboard.noDataHint: Data is scraped daily at 6:00 AM UTC. Check back soon or trigger a manual scrape.
leaderboard.speedDesc: Daily speed benchmarks for AI model providers on Model Exchange. Measures latency, throughput (tokens/sec), and time to first token (TTFT).
leaderboard.noSpeedData: No speed benchmark data available yet.
leaderboard.noSpeedDataHint: Speed benchmarks run daily at 7:00 AM UTC. You can also test your own provider keys from the API Keys page and share results with the community.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.subtitle: Manage your Model Exchange API keys and connect your own provider keys (BYOK).
keys.gatewayDesc: Use a single API endpoint to access all models. Free models work without any key. For paid models, use your MX key or your own provider keys (BYOK).
keys.freeModelsTitle: Free models require no API key
keys.freeModelsDesc: Models like sienovo/smollm are completely free — just call the endpoint directly, no authentication needed. API keys are only required for paid models.
keys.mxKeysDesc: Required only for paid models. Free models work without any key.
keys.keyCreated: Your new API key has been created. Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
keys.keyOnlyOnce: This key will only be displayed once. Store it securely.
keys.noMxKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to start using the gateway.
keys.confirmDeleteKey: Are you sure you want to delete this key? This action cannot be undone.
keys.byokDesc: Add your own provider API keys. The gateway will route requests using your key when available.
keys.label: Label
keys.apiKeyOptionalHint: Leave empty for free services that don't require authentication.
keys.endpointHint: Override the default API endpoint. Leave empty to use the provider's standard endpoint.
keys.noProviderKeysHint: Add your own API keys to use the gateway with your existing provider accounts.

pricingPage.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: Choose how you want to monetize your models. Pay only when you earn.
pricingPage.platformBillingDesc: Let Model Exchange handle payments, invoicing, and usage tracking. We take a small fee and you focus on your model.
pricingPage.externalBillingDesc: Handle payments yourself. List your model for free on our marketplace for exposure.
pricingPage.externalBillingNote: Direct users to your own payment system and API endpoints.
pricingPage.faq1A: For platform billing, we process payouts monthly via bank transfer or Stripe Connect. Revenue earned in a given month is paid out by the 15th of the following month.
pricingPage.faq2Q: Can I switch between billing types?
pricingPage.faq2A: Yes, you can change your billing type at any time from the dashboard. If switching from platform to external billing, any pending revenue will be paid out in the next cycle.
pricingPage.faq3A: No. The 15% platform fee is all-inclusive — it covers payment processing, infrastructure, and support. There are no setup fees, monthly fees, or minimum charges.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Content: By accessing or using the Model Exchange platform ("Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). The Platform is operated by Model Exchange, Inc. ("we", "us", or "our"). If you do not agree to all of these Terms, you may not access or use the Platform. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, model providers, and any other parties who access or use the Platform.
terms.s2Content: Model Exchange is a marketplace that connects AI model providers with consumers. Providers can list their large language models (LLMs) with descriptions, pricing, and technical specifications. Consumers can discover, compare, and integrate these models into their applications. We act as an intermediary platform and do not ourselves provide AI model inference services. All model services are provided directly by the respective model providers listed on the Platform.
terms.s3Content: To access certain features of the Platform, you must register for an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update such information to keep it accurate. You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or that we reasonably believe pose a security risk.
terms.s4Content: If you list a model on the Platform as a provider, you represent and warrant that: (a) you have the legal right to offer the model and its outputs; (b) your model descriptions, benchmarks, and pricing are accurate and not misleading; (c) you will maintain the availability and quality of service as advertised; (d) your model complies with all applicable laws and regulations, including export controls and data protection laws; (e) you will promptly update your listing if any material changes occur to your model's capabilities, pricing, or availability.
terms.s5Content: As a consumer of models listed on the Platform, you agree to: (a) use models only in compliance with the provider's acceptable use policies and all applicable laws; (b) not attempt to reverse-engineer, extract weights from, or otherwise misappropriate any listed model; (c) be responsible for any content you generate using the models; (d) not use models to generate content that is illegal, harmful, deceptive, or infringes on the rights of others; (e) comply with any rate limits, usage quotas, or other technical restrictions imposed by model providers.
terms.s6Content: Model pricing is set by individual providers and displayed in USD per million tokens unless otherwise stated. Prices are subject to change at the provider's discretion. We may charge a platform fee on transactions processed through the Platform, which will be clearly disclosed before you complete any purchase. All payments are processed through our third-party payment processors. You agree to pay all fees and charges incurred in connection with your use of the Platform. Refund policies are determined by individual model providers unless otherwise required by applicable law.
terms.s7Content: The Platform and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by Model Exchange, Inc. and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. Model providers retain all rights to their models and related intellectual property. Consumers retain rights to the outputs they generate using the models, subject to the respective provider's licensing terms. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works of the Platform without our express written permission.
terms.s8Content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Model Exchange, Inc. shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses resulting from: (a) your use or inability to use the Platform; (b) any conduct or content of any third party, including model providers; (c) unauthorized access, use, or alteration of your transmissions or content; (d) the quality, accuracy, or reliability of any model listed on the Platform. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the twelve months preceding the claim.
terms.s9Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes by posting the updated Terms on the Platform and updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the Platform after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms. If you do not agree to the modified Terms, you should discontinue use of the Platform. We encourage you to review these Terms periodically to stay informed of updates.
terms.s10Content: Models listed on the Platform by third-party providers are not developed, maintained, or endorsed by Model Exchange, Inc. We do not guarantee the stability, accuracy, security, or availability of any third-party model. Users should exercise their own judgment when using these models and are solely responsible for evaluating their suitability. Third-party models on the Platform are recommended for learning, research, and experimentation purposes only. For production or commercial-grade deployments requiring guaranteed SLAs, compliance assurance, or dedicated support, please contact us directly at jay.lin@jytech.us for enterprise solutions.
terms.s11Content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@modelexchange.ai. For general support inquiries, reach us at support@modelexchange.ai. For enterprise and commercial inquiries, contact jay.lin@jytech.us. Our mailing address is Model Exchange, Inc., 548 Market Street, Suite 35000, San Francisco, CA 94104, United States.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Content: Model Exchange, Inc. ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use the Model Exchange platform ("Platform"). By using the Platform, you consent to the data practices described in this policy. We encourage you to read this Privacy Policy carefully and contact us if you have any questions.
privacy.s2Content: We collect information you provide directly, including: account registration data (name, email address, organization name), payment information (processed securely by our third-party payment providers — we do not store full credit card numbers), model listing information submitted by providers, and communications you send to us. We also automatically collect: device and browser information, IP address and approximate location, usage data such as pages visited, models viewed, and search queries, cookies and similar tracking technologies, and API usage logs including request timestamps and token counts.
privacy.s3Content: We use the information we collect to: operate, maintain, and improve the Platform; process transactions and send related information including confirmations and invoices; create and manage your account; facilitate communication between model providers and consumers; send you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages; monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities on the Platform; detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent transactions, abuse, and other illegal activities; personalize your experience and provide model recommendations based on your usage patterns; and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.s4Content: We may share your information in the following circumstances: with model providers when you initiate a transaction or request access to their models (limited to information necessary to fulfill the service); with service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing, data analytics, email delivery, hosting, and customer service; in response to a legal request if we believe disclosure is required by applicable law, regulation, or legal process; to protect the rights, property, and safety of Model Exchange, our users, or the public; in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of all or a portion of our assets; and with your consent or at your direction. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s5Content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include encryption of data in transit and at rest, regular security assessments and penetration testing, access controls and authentication mechanisms, employee training on data protection, and incident response procedures. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
privacy.s6Content: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. We will also retain and use your information as necessary to comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. API usage logs are retained for 90 days for operational purposes and then aggregated into anonymized analytics data. If you request account deletion, we will delete or anonymize your personal information within 30 days, except where retention is required by law or for legitimate business purposes such as fraud prevention.
privacy.s7Content: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information: the right to access and receive a copy of your personal data; the right to rectify inaccurate or incomplete data; the right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"); the right to restrict or object to processing; the right to data portability; and the right to withdraw consent at any time. You can exercise these rights by contacting us at privacy@modelexchange.ai. We will respond to your request within 30 days. You may also opt out of marketing communications by clicking the unsubscribe link in any marketing email or by updating your account notification preferences.
privacy.s8Content: Your information may be transferred to and maintained on servers located outside of your country of residence. If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), United Kingdom, or other regions with data protection laws, we ensure that transfers of personal data are protected by appropriate safeguards, such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission or other legally recognized transfer mechanisms. By using the Platform, you consent to the transfer of your information to the United States and other jurisdictions where we operate.
privacy.s9Content: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@modelexchange.ai. You may also reach us by mail at Model Exchange, Inc., 548 Market Street, Suite 35000, San Francisco, CA 94104, United States. If you are located in the EEA, you also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
